name: Mints
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flavoring and food coloring into the cream cheese using a mixer.
2. Gradually add 1/2 cup powdered sugar at a time, continuing to mix.
3. Dip each mint in granulated sugar before placing it in the mold.
4. Store the mints in an airtight container in a cool place.
5. Allow the mints to set for at least one night before serving.
6. Optionally, knead the mixture before dipping in sugar.
